cells.xml_text_content: At risk user1 with access to key services within lower2 and upper2 threshold by composite mode3, region, England, 2007 to 2013
cells.pdf_text_content: At risk user1 with access to key services within lower2 and upper2 threshold by composite mode3, region, England, 2007 to 2013

cells.xml_text_content: Number of people with access within threshold
cells.pdf_text_content: Number of people with access within threshold

cells.xml_text_content: Percentage of people with access within threshold
cells.pdf_text_content: Percentage of people with access within threshold

cells.xml_text_content: 1 The at risk users looks at particular social groups at risk of exclusion, e.g. for primary schools, the at risk users are children aged 5-10 known to be eligible for free school meals. Please see the guidance note for a full list of user groups.
cells.pdf_text_content: 1 The at risk users looks at particular social groups at risk of exclusion, e.g. for primary schools, the at risk users are children aged 5-10 known to be eligible for free school meals. Please see the guidance note for a full list of user groups.

cells.xml_text_content: 2 The number and proportion of users in a local area who can access a service within set time limits. For further information on details on the lower and upper thresholds and how they are derived please see the guidance note.
cells.pdf_text_content: 2 The number and proportion of users in a local area who can access a service within set time limits. For further information on details on the lower and upper thresholds and how they are derived please see the guidance note.

cells.xml_text_content: 3 The composite mode is produced by using the national mode split to weight the indicators by public transport, cycling and walking. Please see the guidance note for further information.
cells.pdf_text_content: 3 The composite mode is produced by using the national mode split to weight the indicators by public transport, cycling and walking. Please see the guidance note for further information.

cells.xml_text_content: 4 An at risk group is not measured for the Further Education service.
cells.pdf_text_content: 4 An at risk group is not measured for the Further Education service.

cells.xml_text_content: 5 Public transport/walking data were not updated for 2012 due to a data quality issue. Please see 2013 statistical release or the guidance notes document for details.
cells.pdf_text_content: 5 Public transport/walking data were not updated for 2012 due to a data quality issue. Please see 2013 statistical release or the guidance notes document for details.

cells.xml_text_content: 6 A new method has been adopted in 2013 for the public transport/walking mode. Please see guidance notes document for details. The 2011 results have been recalculated on the new basis.
cells.pdf_text_content: 6 A new method has been adopted in 2013 for the public transport/walking mode. Please see guidance notes document for details. The 2011 results have been recalculated on the new basis.

cells.xml_text_content: The figures in this table are outside the scope of National Statistics
cells.pdf_text_content: The figures in this table are outside the scope of National Statistics
